description: check a blueprint/workflow for abstract deadlock — structural + EMPIRICAL (TLC)
rules: read-only — reads the blueprint, writes only the certificate
the structural check always runs; TLC adds EMPIRICAL only when TLA2TOOLS_JAR + java are present
TLC absence is recorded honestly as empirical: skipped — never silently treated as a pass
usage: Set TARGET_BLUEPRINT (path to a blueprint.json / workflow.json). Output: modelcheck.json with {structural, empirical, status}.
limitation: EMPIRICAL (TLC) + structural today. SYMBOLIC (Apalache) and AXIOMATIC (TLAPS) certificate classes, and the settlement-lifecycle money perk, arrive with those checkers (plan P4).
